title: Don't check configuration until user input is applied

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.9/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@edsantiago PTAL
Could you check if this PR fixes your issue with the warnings?

What timeframe do you need? Will Monday be OK? I don't have a rhel8 box right now, and just wasted an hour trying to build one with the right repos to build podman. I can't get gpgme, btrfs, devmapper, and a few others; and I can't afford any more time today. I can try to find time over the weekend if it's necessary.

Confirmed: the error message is gone. I managed to build v1.9.0 in rhel8, confirmed that my built image has the multi-line warning; built with your patch, the warning is gone. All system tests pass, root and rootless. LGTM, adding /hold in case there are any other pending reviews. Remove when desired.

/lgtm
/hold

/hold cancel

If this fixes our spurious warnings, LGTM on my end
